menu.title: BOOKWAR
menu.subtitle: War for the Alphabet
menu.hint: WASD — move | E — pick up | I — inventory | T — speak
prologue.title: BOOKWAR
prologue.panel_0:
Once, speech rang throughout the world.
People wrote books, named things, sang songs.
Letters lived in every home, in every word.
prologue.panel_1:
Letters are weapon and shield.
Letters are value.
Letters are everything.
prologue.panel_2:
Then came the Keeper of the Ban —
an ancient being, born of the fear
of the power of the word. He laid a curse.
prologue.panel_3:
The letters were scattered across the dark lands,
beyond the Bright Valley.
The power to speak and write was lost.
prologue.panel_4:
People could no longer understand one another.
No language, no words —
only chaos and silence.
prologue.panel_5:
The sorcerer's minions use only the letters
that serve them, giving them their own meanings.
No one can check — all books are destroyed.
prologue.panel_6:
The world will drown in lies —
lest a hero gather the letters,
the hypocrites and liars shall prevail.
prologue.panel_7:
You are the hero. You set out to reclaim the alphabet,
to restore the truth.

LETTERS ARE TRUTH. Gather them all.
hud.hint: WASD / buttons — move   |   E — take   |   I — inventory   |   T — speak
battle.title: BATTLE
inv.title: Inventory
craft.select_both: Select a letter and a modifier.
region.throne_keeper: Throne of the Keeper of Ban
Добро пожаловать, путник. В нашем мире б: Welcome, traveler. In our world, letters are forbidden. But I shall teach you how to survive.
Видишь эти точки на земле? Они — единств: See those dots on the ground? They are all that remains of words.
Собери три точки — и ты сможешь заговори: Gather three dots and you will be able to speak. Press E next to a dot to pick it up.
Когда соберёшь три точки, они превратятс: Once you have three dots, they become an ellipsis. With it, you can speak to monsters.
Отлично! У тебя есть многоточие. Теперь: Excellent! You have an ellipsis. Now you can speak.
Попробуй подойти к монстру и нажать T, ч: Try approaching a monster and pressing T to begin a dialogue.
Слова могут быть сильнее оружия. Убеди м: Words can be stronger than weapons. Convince a monster to leave, and it will retreat.
Ты нашёл букву! Это великое событие. Бук: You found a letter! A great event. Letters are weapon, shield, and currency at once.
Гласные — атака. Согласные — защита. Наж: Vowels attack. Consonants defend. Press I to open your inventory and view your letters.
Я знаю, где спрятаны буквы. Но подсказки: I know where letters are hidden. But hints cost dots. 5 dots for one hint.
Говорят, к северу от деревни спрятана бу: They say the letter А is hidden north of the village...
You don't have enough dots. Come back later.
monster.name.question: Doubt
forest.q1: You've strayed far, letter-seeker. These trees remember names you have forgotten.
forest.q2: I saw the sorcerer carve words into the bark. The large letters lie by the roots of the old oak, to the east.
forest.q3: Trust no shadows. They wear foreign faces and speak with foreign voices.
forest.e1: Halt! This forest is the Master's domain. Turn back.
forest.e2: Hm. There is a spark in you. Perhaps you are hunter, not prey. Live, for now.
forest.e3: Claws are sharper than any vowel. But a word... a word cuts deeper. Run.
recruit.success: ALLY! %s: Perhaps you are no foe... I'm with you!
recruit.fail: FAIL! %s was not swayed — 3 tokens wasted.
dir.edge: at the very edge of the valley
dir.forest_edge: toward the forest edge, up above
dir.trees: a bit higher, by the trees
dir.hill: to the left, behind the hill
dir.far: far, but I know the place
